headline: Anthropic pushed Claude into the workplace as a scoped autonomous agent this quarter, while tool calling broke out as the dominant technique.
body: Anthropic shipped Claude Tag, which invokes Claude directly inside Slack threads with persistent channel context and a distinct agent identity governed by admin controls and full auditability, rather than impersonating users. Tool calling led the movers with a sharp ratio shift, and agent identity, access control, and audit trails surfaced alongside it. A separate cluster of new entrants in data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection broke into view, and DeepMind framed an agentic economy where millions of autonomous agents transact and negotiate. Supporting work spanned Claude Skills as compounding systems and no-code workflow automation pairing Claude with NotebookLM.

cited_items.title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
